misses.detail: scanned/considered but never bought (capital or rank cutoff)
ran, but Alpaca doesn't list this asset — not tradeable

note: Every runner (>= 3.0% available) we didn't bank, with the CAUSE traced through the funnel: universe_gap (never scanned), filter_rejected (gate blocked it — reason attached), allocation_or_cutoff (considered but not bought), exited_too_early / exited_at_loss_on_up_move (held but sold wrong). Fix the dominant cause first.
